profiles.question: is the resolver pending-aged tail still operationally active, and what can current evidence not testify about?
coverage: Exact-match NQ finding lifecycle state for (resolver, pending_aged_tail, empty subject) at the carried source generation.
Existing admitted finding-observation receipts for that exact identity, bounded to the newest 32 rows.

cannot_testify.statement: This inquiry does not authorize restart, failover, paging, closure, or any other operational consequence.
The carried snapshot cannot testify that the finding remains active after the frozen as_of time.
Finding lifecycle and observation receipts do not establish the root cause of the pending-aged tail.
